content: {"file": "frontend/storyforge-ui/src/app/pages/dashboard/dashboard.component.ts", "summary": "The DashboardComponent manages the loading and display of job summaries from a service. It initializes by calling loadJobs() in ngOnInit(). This method fetches jobs, updates the UI with fetched data or an error message upon completion.", "rules": [{"name": "Load Jobs", "description": "Fetches job summaries on component initialization.", "conditions": ["Component is initialized"], "actions": ["Call loadJobs()", "Set loading to true"]}, {"name": "Handle Job Fetch Success", "description": "Updates the jobs array and sets loading state when job fetch succeeds.", "conditions": ["Job fetch completes successfully"], "actions": ["Update jobs with fetched data", "Set loading to false"]}, {"name": "Handle Job Fetch Error", "description": "Sets an error message and updates loading state upon job fetch failure.", "conditions": ["Job fetch fails"], "actions": ["Set loadError to 'Unable to load assessment jobs.'", "Set loading to false"]}], "dependencies": ["../../services/storyforge.service"]}
